input_text: Cities in Estonia are estonian. Winona is a sheep. Mary tried to solve the puzzle. Mike is a boxer. The room was cleaned. "Riga is outside America. Emily is a wolf. Sue is a true patriot. A nice elephant was strong. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. Dole was defeated by Clinton. The glass was broken by the boy. The teacher showed the students a map. The children playing in the garden laughed. Anna handed Mark a key. The cup filled with water fell. Penguins do not fly. A village road was narrow. These links present the many viewpoints that existed. Agatha is in trouble. The roof of John's house is green. Eve sent Tom a long letter. The guide offered the tourists tea. Tallinn is hardly in Latvia. The man standing by the door coughed. Frogs are small. This book is more interesting than that one. Mice are afraid of cats. The rain continued. Earth contains Europe. The picture was painted by Leo. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. John has a house?
